rulings.Case Title: BARRAZA VS BARRAZA

rulings.Case Title: WILTZ VS RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN INC
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. BURDEN SHIFTED BY SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE. REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. (JH)

rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 4-25-02 PER MOVING PARTY.

rulings.Case Title: MANAGEMENT COLLEGE VS CATHEDRAL HILL
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED ON CONDITION PLAINTIFF FILE AMENDMENT STATING WHAT DATE EJECTED FROM PREMISES I.E. MAY 17 OR MAY 18. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: RALPH SCOTT VS BRITISH MOTOR CAR
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND RECONSIDERATION ORDER. SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AMENDED COMPLAINT TO BE FILED APRIL 3. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: RALPH SCOTT VS BRITISH MOTOR CAR DISTRIB
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND RECONSIDERATION ORDER. SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AMENDED COMPLAINT TO BE FILED APRIL 3. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: SHRAYBER VS. HOLIDAY HARBOR, INC.
rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 04/17/02. BOTH PARTIES TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES PER LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATTACH COVER LETTER CONFIRMING NEW HEARING DATE.

rulings.Case Title: VIDAL VS MENAGED
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE FOR ALL PURPOSES DENIED NOT SUFFICIENTLY RELATED. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE (W/#325025) FOR DISCOVERY GRANTED. (CL)

rulings.Case Title: BORSUK VS RYAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: First Amended Petition To Compel Arb;Amended Notice Of First Amended Petition;P&As;Decl. Of Thomas Del Beccaro
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION GRANTED AS TO ALL ISSUES SINCE DISPUTES ARISE OUT OF MATTERS INCLUDED IN CO-TENANCY AGREEMENT. (CW/RC) (#324908 CONSOLIDATED WITH #401473)

rulings.Case Title: CATHALENE HEFNER VS. ALEXIS WONG
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO JOIN CORPORATE EMPLOYER AS PARTY DEFENDANT AND TO OTHERWISE CORRECT ALLEGATIONS. DEFENDANT EMPLOYER FAILURE TO PAY REQUIRED ARBITRATORS IS TO BE ALLEGED AS WAIVER OF RIGHT TO ARBITRATE BY EMPLOYER. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD P. ALLEN VS. JEFFREY DE WEESE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: - Renotice Of Mtn To Strike 2nd Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED ON CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF STIPULATE NO PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE SOUGHT UNDER CIVIL CODE 1780(A)(4). (JH)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA KUHL VS. A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, DEFT DISMISSED.
